sglang.title: [Fix] Fix a bug for flashmla to run R1 model

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When using sglang to run R1 Model by TP = 16, there is a bug for flashmla.
I investigated this issue and found that it causes illegal access to the HMB when the seq_length is zero, leading to a program crash.
So, we should not pass a invalid parameter to flashmla kernel. I chose the numbe

sglang.title: [Misc] add service discovery for sgl router
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR implements Kubernetes service discovery for SGL Router, allowing it to automatically discover and manage worker pods based on label selectors. The router can dynamically add worker URLs when healthy pods are discovered and remove them when pods are unhealthy or deleted.
Key Featu

sglang.title: [fix]: PyO3 macOS linking and consolidate on tracing for logging
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation


When building the project on macOS, we encountered linking errors with PyO3 - the linker couldn't find Python symbols like _PyBaseObject_Type and others
We had redundant logging dependencies (log and tracing)

Modifications


Added .cargo/config.toml with platform-specific configuration

auto set draft model path if not given

With this improvement, we don't need to specify --speculative-draft-model-path for DeepSeek-V3/R1 MTP since we load w

sglang.title: [fix] relax mem_fraction_static for h200
sglang.author: Alcanderian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Related to #5662 #5811 #5602 #5634
Relax mem_fraction_static to reserve at at least 18GB for H200.
For TP8, we can observe:

The free memory on H100 is 80 GB – 80 GB × 0.81 = 15.2 GB.
However, we only reserve 13 GB for H200 (self.mem_fraction_static = (gpu_mem - 1024 * 13) / gpu_mem), whi

sglang.title: feat: support pythonic tool call and index in tool call streaming
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Llama4 uses pythonic format for tool call. Same as small Llama3.2 models (1B and 3B). SGLang lacks pythonic format detector.
Also OpenAI has index field in the tool call chunk during streaming, see here, this PR adds the support.

Modifications

Adds PythonicDetector to function_call_pars

sglang.title: [Bugfix]: fix missing queue_time_start for requests from grammar_queue
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR fixes a bug where requests added to grammar_queue (typically the first tool call request requiring grammar resolution) do not have their queue_time_start set. As a result, these requests lack proper timing information, the scheduler throws an error and the server exits.
Modificat

vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Setuptools appears to have introduced a bug in v80.0.0 resulting in a crash when trying to run python setup.py develop with a --prefix
Original issue filed at pypa/setuptools#4966
Until it is addressed we should restrict the version
This is a generalization of #17298
Another issue is that v80 will r

See: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/9dbf7a2/vllm/model_executor/layers/rotary_embedding.py#L99
Similar to llama: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/6d0df0/vllm/model_executor/models/llama.py#L383-L411
cc: @youkaichao

Note: The keyword argument for disabling thinking mode depends on the chat template. For example, Granite 3.2 uses thinking while Qwen 3 uses enable_thinking.

from

Handle list[Literal] where we want the argument to accept multiple values from a set of choices

vllm.title: fix gemma3 results all zero
vllm.author: mayuyuace
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
X+residual will be bigger than max value of float16 (65504) when I try to run Gemma3 with param --dtype float16.
Then the token_ids of model result will be all zero.
Therefore, residual should be float if orig_dtype is float16.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Minicpm-O-int4 GPTQ model inference
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #17358

Similar to Qwen2-VL, MiniCPM-O skip quantization in its ViT and Resampler for gptq quantization.
This PR added same _maybe_ignore_quant_config from Qwen2-VL to MiniCPM-O to make the int4 gptq model work.

Task 8 of #15901
A few notes regarding the implementation.
Torch.compile

@support_torch_compile is convenient but requires a specific signature for the model. Changes in vllm/model_executor/models/llama_eagle.py address this requirement.
Further, to make torch.compile work, we need a separate cache

vllm.title: [V1][Feature] Enable Speculative Decoding with Structured Outputs
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR changes the structured outputs behaviour in a few ways:

The generated speculative draft tokens are validated according to the grammar to ensure they match the grammar constraints. This operation should not modify the matcher state.
A bitmask is generated by the scheduler for each speculativ

vllm.title: [release] Always git fetch all to get latest tag on TPU release
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The repo inside TPU release instance doesn't fetch the latest tags so the version in .git is stale. This is to run git fetch everytime release job runs so the version can be tagged correctly with latest tag.

vllm.title: Truncation control for embedding models
vllm.author: gmarinho2
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Issue #13489 (#13489)
Enables truncation control for offline and online API for embedding models via the paramenter truncate_prompt_tokens. When truncate_prompt_tokens=-1 the maximum prompt length that the model supports is used. When it exceeds the maximum prompt length, an error is raised. When 0

vllm.title: Update PyTorch to 2.7.0
vllm.author: huydhn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Notable changes:

PyTorch 2.7.0 has dropped CUDA 12.4, so the remaining options are 12.6 and 12.8

CUDA 12.6 has build issue #15435 (comment), so only 12.8 remains


We need a new xformers (0.0.30 is ready now), flashinfer, and mamba-ssm packages, so let build them from source for now.  They can be

vllm.title: Improve configs - `ModelConfig`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follows #16332, #16422, #16533, #16603, #16789, #16835, #16971, #16980
Notable changes:

Type hints on QuantizationConfig and LLM classes have been made more specific, using a Literal of possible options instead of str
ModelConfig is no longer used as a key to a dictionary in the multimodal registry

vllm.title: Fix call to `logger.info_once`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: logger.info_once is a custom method which does not support %s like a regular logger.info

vllm.title: Fix some speculative decode tests with tl.dot

I'm seeing these failures from my other PR #16859, but they don't seem to be related to PyTorch 2.7.0 release. They seem to come from #13305 with the issue on Triton triton-lang/triton#2266.  I have seen similar a PR from PyTorch about this pytorch/pytorch#147765.
The PR attempts to fix the failed t
